name: FX-Studio-AI
description: FX Studio AI — Plugin Marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: pipeline-orchestrator
plugins.description: Single-command multi-agent pipeline for Claude Code. Auto-classifies tasks, executes in adaptive batches with adversarial review, defense-in-depth gates, and proportional validation.

plugins.name: skill-advisor
plugins.description: Intelligent toolchain orchestrator for Claude Code — recommends skills, plugins, MCPs, and agents for any task with dependency-aware ordering

plugins.name: cc-toolkit
plugins.description: Claude Code Swiss Army Knife — diagnose, configure, and build your Claude Code environment. Meta-skill /cc with triage menu + 9 specialized skills for context audit, MCP, hooks, agents, prompts, security, setup, and skill building.

plugins.name: engineering-context
plugins.description: Generates mandatory engineering rules, architecture contracts, anti-pattern catalogs, and validation tests adapted to any project's stack. 6 focused skills: setup, detect-stack, map-architecture, generate-rules, mine-anti-patterns, validate-context.
